raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"If this pace stayed the same for another month, what would be the first thing to crack?","description":"Surfaces whether the current workload is sustainable or already eating into recovery.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery time","name":"What has actually helped you recover outside work lately?","description":"Checks whether he has real recovery time or is just pushing through fatigue.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Home friction","name":"What's been making it harder to switch off at home?","description":"Opens space for non-work stressors that may be affecting energy without assuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team load","name":"Where is the team making your work lighter or heavier than it should be?","description":"Surfaces whether team interactions are helping or adding drag to his week.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership signal","name":"What part of the work are you still naturally leaning into?","description":"Checks current motivation and where he is still taking initiative versus coasting.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Energy drain","name":"What part of your week is taking more out of you than it should?","description":"Finds the specific work pattern or task that is draining energy and investment.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear edges","name":"Where does your role still feel fuzzy or too open-ended?","description":"Surfaces ambiguity in expectations, boundaries, or decision rights.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Dependency risk","name":"What are you waiting on that could quietly slow you down next?","description":"Identifies dependencies before they turn into visible blockers.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What would I be missing if I only looked at your calendar and tickets?","description":"Invites him to name hidden support needs, context switching, or invisible load.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch work","name":"What kind of problem would you like more of right now?","description":"Surfaces desired stretch and whether the current work is giving him room to grow.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback quality","name":"Where is the feedback you're getting actually changing how you work?","description":"Checks whether feedback is landing as useful learning or just noise.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step","name":"What skill do you want to be sharper at by the end of this quarter?","description":"Makes growth concrete and time-bound, with a chance to connect it to current work.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]}]}
